title: microlicia glutinosa
intro: Microlicia glutinosa, a species of flowering plant, is a type of shrub that belongs to the family Melastomataceae. Traditionally, the plant is used in folk medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Microlicia glutinosa are associated with its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and exhibit antioxidant activity, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or extract, and is also used in traditional remedies for its reported healing properties.
